segments.title: 捕获与反叛 / The Escape
segments.summary: 麦克斯在废土被不死乔的狂热战争男孩捕获。指挥官芙莉欧莎反叛，驾驶战甲车带走了乔的五个妻子。

segments.title: 狂沙风暴 chase / Sandstorm
segments.summary: 庞大的追击车队在荒漠展开狂飙，芙莉欧莎驾车冲进极度危险的超级沙尘暴中，暂时甩开了追兵。

segments.title: 麦克斯同盟 / Alliance
segments.summary: 风暴过后，麦克斯苏醒并打败了守卫，与芙莉欧莎和妻子们达成了脆弱的同盟，共同抵御后续追兵。

segments.title: 峡谷血战 / Canyon Pass
segments.summary: 车队在狭窄的岩石峡谷中遭遇摩托党伏击。在一场剧烈的爆破战中，他们惊险突出重围。

segments.title: 夜陷泥潭 / Swamps
segments.summary: 黑夜降临，战甲车陷入了泥泞潮湿的沼泽地中。麦克斯使用狙击枪成功击退了赶来的子弹农夫。

segments.title: 众母之地 / Vuvalini
segments.summary: 车队遇到了芙莉欧莎阔别已久的故乡部族——Vuvalini“众母”。但她们悲哀地得知故乡早已毁灭。

segments.title: 重返荒原的决议 / Turning Back
segments.summary: 在准备横渡盐沼时，麦克斯劝说大家放弃无望的逃亡，回头反攻防御薄弱的不死乔要塞。

segments.title: 终极公路之战 / Final Battle
segments.summary: 车队调头返回，与不死乔的联合军队在公路上爆发了震耳欲聋、火光冲天的生死决战，乔被斩杀。

segments.title: 要塞的曙光 / Freedom
segments.summary: 车队载着乔的尸体回到要塞，民众欢呼雀跃。芙莉欧莎带领人们开启了新纪元，麦克斯隐入人群。

subtitles.text: My world is fire and blood.
Why are you hurting these people?
- Oil wars. - We are killing for guzzoline.
The world is running out of water.
A road warrior searching for a righteous cause.
Mankind has gone rogue, terrorizing itself.
each of us, in our own way, was broken.
It was hard to know who was more crazy:
- Here they come again. - Max Rockatansky.
Worming their way into the black matter of my brain.
- Help us, Max. - You promised to help us.
who runs from both the living and the dead.
Haunted by those I could not protect.
So I exist in this wasteland.
A man reduced to a single instinct:
Rev it up for the Immortan Joe!
Once again, we send off my War Rig to bring back...
and bullets from the Bullet Farm!
Once again, I salute my Imperator...
who will ride with me eternal...
you will rise from the ashes...
It will take hold of you...
and you will resent its absence.
Signal Gas Town. Convoy's on its way.
Hey! Careful. That's a universal donor.
Boss, we're not going to Gas Town?
I'll pass it down the line.
This is not a supply run!
- Ace, what's going on? - Go. We're heading east.
- Why? - I don't know. That's the order.
Your produce ain't going to Gas Town.
You cannot own a human being.
Sooner or later someone pushes back!
She didn't take them. They begged her to go!
Treason. Betrayal. An Imperator gone rogue.
Furiosa! She took a lot of stuff from Immortan Joe.
He wants them back! Not a hand laid on them.
By my deeds I honor him.
Not today. Today is my day.
If you can't stand up, you can't do war.
I'm not staying here dying soft.
- I just need a top-up. More juice. - No time!
We take my Blood Bag and strap him to the lancer's perch.
It's got a muzzle on it. It's feral.
High-octane crazy blood filling me up.
I'm gonna die historic on the Fury Road.
- Organic, hitch up his Blood Bag. - Eh?
How much more can they take from me?
They've got my blood. Now it's my car!
- He looked right at me! - He looked at your Blood Bag!
He turned his head. He looked me in the eye.
We got vehicles from the Citadel.
They want reinforcements from Gas Town...
- Buzzards right! Eyes on! Eyes on! - Buzzards right!
Should we turn it around and run them into our backup?
First, we get the Buzzards off her back!
Get up! You can do it!
Now we bring home the booty.
She thinks she can lose us, Dad.
She thinks she can lose us in there!
We need counterweight. Get the Blood Bag down the back.
Hunt them down! Hunt them down!
Come on! We've almost got her!
I live, I die, I live again!
Angharad, is that just the wind...
or is that a furious vexation?
Glory me, Blood Bag! We snagged her alive.
He's gonna shred her. Shred her.
I wanna drive the War Rig.
- What are you gonna ask for? - That's my jacket.
- You can ask for more than a jacket. - We're going to the Green Place.
Wait, it's you and me. Ugh!
We're going to the Green Place of Many Mothers.
- It hurts. - Out here, everything hurts.
Now pick up what you can and run.
This Rig goes nowhere without me.
You're relying on the gratitude of a very bad man.
You've damaged one of his wives. How grateful do you think he's gonna be?
You're sitting on 2000 horsepower of nitro-boosted war machine.
I'd say you got about a five-minute head start.
You want that thing off your face?
Of all the legs you had to shoot, that one was attached to his favorite.
You don't have to do it just because he tells you.
- What choice does she have? - He's not gonna hurt us. He needs us.
Think he's coming to the Green Place?
and there's the People Eater himself.
I think it's the fuel pod.
- This War Boy wants me dead! - We agreed!
He's just a kid at the end of his half-life!
No! I live. I die. I live again!
- They're coming from the Bullet Farm. - Yeah?
It's over. You can't defy him.
- who grabbed the sun. - Look how slick he's fooled you.
- He's a lying old man. - By his hand...
- we'll be lifted up! - That's why we have...
his logo seared on our backs!
- You're an old man's "Battle Fodder"! - Killing everyone...
- and everything. - We're not to blame!
I made a deal up ahead. Safe passage.
I don't know if it's still any good.
You may have to drive the Rig.
Whatever you do, you can't be seen.
you drive out of here as fast as you can.
Three thousand gallons of guzzoline, just like you asked!
clear the rocks and bring everyone through.
I got a War Boy! Says he was on the War Rig.
I got the Blood Bag's boot!
All this for a family squabble.
Immortan. If I get on the Rig, there's a way inside.
- What is your name? - It's Nux.
I'll pike her in the spine. Keep her breathing.
Put a bullet in her skull.
Stop the Rig, return my treasures to me...
and I, myself, will carry you...
Tell him to turn the Rig around!
He doesn't know what he's talking about!
Whatever happens, we're going to the Green Place.
The stupid Green Place. We don't even know where to find it!
He'll forgive us. I know he will.
We were protected! He gave us the high life!
- What's wrong with that? - We are not things.
- I don't want to hear that again! - They were her words!
Wring your hands and tear your hair...
You're not going back to him.
It's a long night's run, heading east.
Match every gun with its bullets.
I'm gonna go and do some repairs.
We need someone down the back.
I want you to stay together.
My own Blood Bag driving the Rig that killed her.
Three times the gates were open to me.
I should be walking with the Immorta. McFeasting with the heroes of all time.
I'd say it was your manifest destiny not to.
I thought I was being spared for something great.
I got to drive a pursuit vehicle.
For a while even Larry and Barry stopped chewing on my windpipe.
If they don't get me, then the Night Fevers will.
Well, we've only got four for Big Boy here, so he's all but useless.
we can squirt off this little pinky a raunchy 29 times.
Angharad used to call them Antiseed.
Plant one and watch something die.
We are down 30,000 units of guzzoline...
you have us stuck in a quagmire.
It's gone awful quiet in there.
Come on! I've been called to the torture!
Oh, you stay here with your grief, Daddy.
- I'll fetch them for you. - Be careful! Protect the assets!
could have been your viable human!
I had a little baby brother!
Wouldn't wanna shoot the wives, sir.
I thought we threw him off the Rig!
- just beyond that thing. - He means the tree.
Say, anyone notice that bright light? Encroaching gunfire?
I can do this. I know this machine.
I'm gonna use the winch around the tree thing!
- Hold up a flare! - I am holding a flare!
- Closer! - It's right in front of your eyes!
I am the scales of justice!
Conductor of the choir of death!
Don't they know they're shooting at us?
I never thought I'd do something as shine as that.
Hey. You need to take the War Rig half a klick down the track.
What if you're not back by the time the engines have cooled?
What do you suppose he's gonna do?
How do you know this place even exists?
I was taken as a child.
Now that I drive a War Rig...
this is the best shot I'll ever have.
Hurry! Please, hurry! They'll be back!
My Initiate Mother was K.T. Concannon!
I am the daughter of Mary Jabassa.
Plus the ones I don't remember.
The West. Citadel. Beyond the mountains.
Where did you find such creatures?
This one has all her teeth!
I can't wait for them to see it.
But if you came from the West...
The creepy place with all the crows.
- The soil. - We had to get out.
- We had no water. - The water was filth.
It was poisoned. It was sour.
That's what you call a satellite.
Miss Giddy told us about those.
They used to bounce messages across the Earth.
Everyone in the old world had a show.
Those are the Plains of Silence.
Stay right where you are, little Joe.
Kind of lost its novelty out here.
You kill people with that, do you?
Killed everyone I ever met out here.
Headshots. All of them. Snap. Right in the medulla.
Thought somehow you girls were above that.
I plant one every chance I get.
So far, nothing's took. Earth's too sour.
Back then, everyone had their fill.
Back then, there was no need to snap anybody.
We're never gonna have a better chance to make it across the salt.
If we leave the Rig here, and load the motorcycles up with as much as we can...
we can maybe ride for 160 days.
One of those bikes is yours.
You're more than welcome to come with us.
You know, hope is a mistake.
If you can't fix what's broken, you'll, uh...
Help us. You promised to help us.
I thought you weren't insane anymore.
He wants to go back from where they came.
What's there to find at the Citadel?
There's a ridiculous amount of clear water. And a lot of crops.
Got everything you need. Long as you're not afraid of heights.
Where does the water come from?
He pumps it up from deep in the earth. Calls
it Aqua Cola and claims it for himself.
And because he owns it, he owns all of us.
It'll take two weeks to skirt the Wall of Mountains.
I suggest we go back the same way we came.
It's open. We know that. Right? He brought all his war parties through.
So we take the War Rig and we charge it right through the middle of them.
And how exactly do we take the Citadel?
Assuming we're still alive by then.
If we can block the pass, it'll be easy.
All that's left are his War Pups and War Boys too sick to fight.
He'll be bringing us home. Bringing back what's stolen, as he's meant to.
But I guarantee you that a 160 days' ride that way...
At least that way, you know, we might be able to...
come across some kind of redemption.
They are heading for the canyon.
They're going back to the Citadel!
He'll try to get in front of us. Spike our wheels.
Engine one is gone. Two's about to blow.
- Stay with me. - Stay with me.
You finish that! I'll finish her!
We're gonna see two airborne V8s.
I'm gonna need you to drive.
I'll get him out of our way.
- What are you doing? - Good girl.
When you're across safe, I'll jam the throttle and follow you.
Hurry! We're nearly at the pass.
Why is she making that noise?
She's pumping air into her chest cavity.
Put that on there. Press it in. Hey.
- No, no, no. No, no, no. - She's exsanguinated.
All right, hold it up. Hold it up.
There you go. Okay. There you go.
Let them up! Let them up!
Let them up! Let them up!
